creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
If I kill any app/proccess then taskmanager crashes.

#0  0x0000000801b3d8f4 in gtk_tree_view_get_selection () from /usr/local/lib/libgtk-3.so.0

On i386 memory size show OK.
